title_zh: OpenAI模型驳斥离散几何中的核心猜想
title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
summary_zh: 一款OpenAI模型解决了80年的单位距离问题，驳斥了离散几何中的一个重要猜想，标志着AI驱动数学的里程碑。
summary_en: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这证明了AI不仅能辅助数学研究，还能独立发现和解决长期未解的难题，推动数学和人工智能的融合发展。
why_it_matters_en: This demonstrates AI's potential not only to assist but also independently solve longstanding mathematical problems, advancing the integration of mathematics and artificial intelligence.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI教育助力计划进入新阶段
title_en: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
summary_zh: OpenAI推进教育助力计划，通过新合作、教师培训和工具，推动人工智能在学校的应用，提升全球学习成果。
summary_en: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
why_it_matters_zh: 此举有助于加速人工智能在教育领域的普及，改善教学质量和学生学习体验，体现了OpenAI在教育公平与创新方面的积极贡献。
why_it_matters_en: This initiative helps accelerate AI adoption in education, improving teaching quality and student learning experiences, demonstrating OpenAI's commitment to educational equity and innovation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Ramp工程师如何利用Codex加速代码审查
title_en: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
summary_zh: Ramp工程师使用集成了GPT-5.5的Codex来审查代码并发布改进，从而能在几分钟内获得实质性反馈，而不是数小时。
summary_en: Ramp engineers use Codex integrated with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, enabling them to receive substantive feedback within minutes instead of hours.
why_it_matters_zh: 利用先进的GPT-5.5技术，Ramp团队显著提高了代码审查的效率，这加速了开发周期并提升了软件质量。
why_it_matters_en: By leveraging advanced GPT-5.5 technology, the Ramp team significantly improves code review efficiency, accelerating development cycles and enhancing software quality.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore启动了一项多年期的AI合作伙伴关系，旨在扩大AI应用，培养本地人才，支持企业和公共服务。
summary_en: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
why_it_matters_zh: 推动新加坡的AI技术落地和人才培养，有助于提升本地经济和公共服务效率。
why_it_matters_en: Promoting AI deployment and talent development in Singapore helps boost the local economy and public service efficiency.

title_zh: 推动内容来源追溯，构建更安全透明的AI生态系统
title_en: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
summary_zh: OpenAI通过推出内容凭证、SynthID及验证工具，提升AI内容来源追溯，帮助人们识别并信任AI生成的媒体。
summary_en: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
why_it_matters_zh: 内容追溯技术对于防止误导信息和提升媒体信任度至关重要，OpenAI的新工具加强了AI生成内容的透明度和安全性。
why_it_matters_en: Content provenance is crucial for preventing misinformation and enhancing media trust; OpenAI's new tools bolster transparency and safety of AI-generated content.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
